Who We Are

Built to Challenge the Ordinary

We didn't start HariNiti Finance to be just another advisory firm — we started it to challenge the way finance is understood and delivered.

For too long, financial decisions have been driven by complexity, hidden motives, and generic advice. We built HariNiti Finance to bring clarity where there is confusion, strategy where there is uncertainty, and transparency where there is doubt.

At HariNiti Finance Private Limited, we don't just manage finances — we save your time, optimize your resources, protect your capital, and shape your financial future.

Our Mission

To create a new standard of financial advisory that is intelligent, ethical, personalized, and relentlessly focused on real growth.

Our Vision

To be the most trusted financial growth partner for businesses and individuals across India.

Our Belief

Confident decisions build powerful futures. We bring finance, law, strategy, and technical expertise under one roof.

What We Do

Comprehensive Financial Solutions

From startup incorporation to asset management — we provide end-to-end financial services under one roof.

Loan & Funding Assistance

End-to-end support for securing the right loans and funding solutions tailored to your business needs.

Business Financial Advisory

Strategic financial planning and advisory to drive informed decisions and sustainable business growth.

Accounting, GST & Tax

Comprehensive bookkeeping, GST compliance, and income tax consultancy to keep you always audit-ready.

MCA & Legal Compliance

MCA services, legal compliances, NCLT and IBC consultancy for robust corporate governance.

Financial Consultancy & Asset Management

Expert asset management and financial consultancy services to grow and protect your wealth.

Startup India & Incorporation

Business incorporation, Startup India registration, and end-to-end setup support for new ventures.

Virtual CFO Services

Get the expertise of a Chief Financial Officer without the full-time cost — strategic finance on demand.

Funding & Valuation Support

Business valuation, investor-ready financials, and fundraising strategy for growth-stage companies.

Real Estate Investment Support

Expert guidance on real estate investment analysis, structuring, and portfolio optimization.

Stalled Projects Funding

Specialized funding support and financial restructuring for stalled or distressed projects.

Our Strength

A Multidisciplinary Expert Team

One Team. Multiple Perspectives. One Goal — Your Financial Growth.

10+

Chartered Accountants

Deep financial insight, compliance excellence, taxation strategy, audit expertise, and structured advisory.

5+

MBAs

Strategic planning, business growth models, financial analysis, and performance optimization.

5+

Advocates & Company Secretaries

Legal structuring, corporate governance, regulatory compliance, and risk management.

—

Engineers & Technical Experts

Analytical precision, project evaluation, and sector-specific financial structuring support.

We combine finance, law, strategy, and technical expertise under one roof to create measurable impact.

Let's Build Your Financial Future Together

Ready to take control of your finances? Schedule a free strategy call and let's discuss how we can help you grow.
